evidence.snippet: Calnetix Technologies designs, develops, and manufactures a wide range of high-speed permanent magnet (PM) motor generators for a variety of applications and industries. Our _**high-speed motors**_, _**high-speed generators**_, and _**magnetic rotor gen sets**_ are designed from a base flexible modular structure, developed using technologically advanced engineering methods to ensure optimal magnetic rotor efficiency.

*   Applications such as chiller systems, compressors, blowers, generators for turboexpanders, blood pumps, electrically assisted turbochargers, UXVs, satellites, test stands, food spray dryers and precision lasers

items.notes: Core business is designing and manufacturing high-speed permanent magnet motors and generators; UXVs explicitly listed as an application for Magnaforce™ product line.

evidence.snippet: ](/active-magnetic-bearings)[

Calnetix’s integrated propulsion systems combine light weight and [power dense permanent magnet motors](/case-studies/high-performance-energy-recovery-system), and SiC based [Enercycle™ power electronics](https://www.calnetix.com/variable-frequency-drives). The integrated system can reduce energy consumption and installed size and weight, while improving reliability, operational flexibility, and meeting stringent emission standards.

items.notes: Variable Frequency Drives and Enercycle™ power electronics (SiC-based inverters/motor drives) are a named product line.

evidence.snippet:
*   [Active Magnetic Bearings](/active-magnetic-bearings)
    *   [Passive Magnetic Bearings](/passive-magnetic-bearings)

items.notes: Active Magnetic Bearings and Passive Magnetic Bearings are dedicated product lines for aerospace and industrial use.

evidence.snippet: Calnetix Technologies’ Defense & Aerospace division has designed a variety of solutions combining gas turbines and [Magnaforce™ permanent magnet (PM) motor generators](/high-speed-electric-motor-generators) ranging from auxiliary power units (APUs) for today’s advanced fighter aircrafts and UAVs to self-contained industrial power generation systems rated at 500 kW or more.

items.notes: Magnaforce™ generators used in APUs for UAVs and aircraft; offers starter-generator and terrestrial power generation systems.

evidence.snippet:
HEADQUARTERS
Calnetix Technologies LLC
6200 Gateway Dr.
Cypress, CA 90630

After more than 20 years of providing electric power generation and conversion solutions to OEMs, Calnetix is utilizing its proven expertise to provide electrification technologies for mission critical defense and aerospace applications.

*   Applications such as chiller systems, compressors, blowers, generators for turboexpanders, blood pumps, electrically assisted turbochargers, UXVs, satellites, test stands, food spray dryers and precision lasers

Calnetix Technologies’ Defense & Aerospace division has designed a variety of solutions combining gas turbines and [Magnaforce™ permanent magnet (PM) motor generators](/high-speed-electric-motor-generators) ranging from auxiliary power units (APUs) for today’s advanced fighter aircrafts and UAVs to self-contained industrial power generation systems rated at 500 kW or more.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Calnetix sells high-speed PM motors, magnetic bearings, and VFDs to drone/UAV OEMs. UXVs explicitly listed as application; they describe themselves as supplying custom motors to OEMs.

tagline: Manufactures high-speed permanent magnet motors, generators, magnetic bearings, and power electronics for defense, aerospace, and industrial applications. Core competency in oil-free active magnetic bearing systems and variable frequency drives for rotating machinery. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of defense/aerospace contracts limited.
